issue_title: 💄 style(command palette): fix CommandPalette empty message style
issue_body_preview:
## Issue

- resolve:

## Why is this change needed?
<!-- Please explain briefly why this change is necessary -->

The position of the `CommandPalette` empty message was unexpectedly above than the center of the container. This PR will fix the position to make it prettier.

||before|after|
test_description_zh: 打开 CommandPalette 组件，在搜索框中输入一个不会匹配任何结果的关键词，观察空状态提示消息在容器中的位置。
expected_result_zh: 空状态提示消息应在 CommandPalette 容器中垂直居中显示，而不是偏向容器上方。
